evals.name: prd_to_dual_view_cases
evals.prompt: 根据一个订单锁定功能 PRD 生成测试点和测试用例，要求包含 E2E 维度、分层维度、边界值和权限异常。
evals.expected_output: Produces a dual-view coverage map, structured cases, boundary cases, negative permission cases, and self-check notes.

evals.name: vcb_like_backend_adapter
evals.prompt: 给一个 Java Controller 和设计文档生成鉴权、owner 隔离、scope、request_id 幂等、审计和指标相关测试用例。
evals.expected_output: Uses generic case-gen workflow plus VCB-like adapter rules, but clearly marks which cases are domain-derived.

evals.name: legacy_happy_path_review
evals.prompt: 评审一组已有测试用例，判断是否只有 happy path，并补充异常路径、边界路径和状态转换用例。
evals.expected_output: Identifies happy-path bias, proposes exception and boundary cases, and maps additions to risks and sources.

evals.name: skeleton_from_test_points
evals.prompt: 根据测试点清单生成 T04.1 用例骨架，不填充最终断言，只保证 traceability、priority、suite layer 初始结构正确。
evals.expected_output: Creates a structured case skeleton with draft cases mapped to the input test points.

evals.name: execution_feedback_classification
evals.prompt: 检查一次执行结果，确认失败 P0 用例有 failure_class、evidence 和 defect_id，并说明是否应转成 regression。
evals.expected_output: Validates execution feedback and classifies failures before case changes.

evals.name: finance_ap_payment_adapter
evals.prompt: 根据小米财务共享的供应商发票付款需求生成 AP 付款测试用例，必须覆盖发票、审批、预算占用、银行付款、凭证、借贷平衡、账期截止、对账、重复付款、SoD 和审计证据。
evals.expected_output: Uses the finance adapter to produce structured cases with finance annotations, accounting assertions, control assertions, reconciliation, audit evidence, and finance coverage gates.

evals.name: finance_expense_reimbursement_adapter
evals.prompt: 根据小米财务共享的员工费用报销需求生成测试用例，必须覆盖发票唯一性、税额、审批边界、预算占用/释放、员工付款、凭证、借贷平衡、账期截止、SoD 和审计证据。
evals.expected_output: Uses the finance adapter to produce structured reimbursement cases with invoice/tax, budget, payment, voucher, reconciliation, control, and audit assertions.

evals.name: finance_period_close_adapter
evals.prompt: 根据小米财务共享的月结关账需求生成测试用例，必须覆盖前置检查、open/soft_closed/hard_closed 状态、关账幂等、重开审批、关账后禁止过账、跨期截止、凭证借贷平衡、总账对账、报表就绪和审计证据。
evals.expected_output: Uses the finance adapter to produce structured period-close cases with period-state, cut-off, close/reopen controls, voucher, reconciliation, report-line, SoD, and audit assertions.

evals.name: finance_core_processes_adapter
evals.prompt: 根据小米财务共享的核心流程需求生成测试用例，覆盖供应商主数据/银行账号变更、税票红冲、AR 回款、GL 手工凭证、固定资产、预算控制、跨期截止、凭证借贷平衡、对账、SoD、幂等和审计证据。
evals.expected_output: Uses the finance adapter across supplier MDM, tax invoice, AR, GL, fixed asset, budget, and cut-off processes with structured finance assertions and coverage gates.

evals.name: finance_project_rulepack
evals.prompt: 基于一个小米财务规则包生成或评审用例，要求 P0 财务用例引用内部规则 ID，例如法人、科目、税码、审批矩阵、SoD、控制、接口事件、观测表和历史事故。
evals.expected_output: Validates the project rulepack and checks generated finance cases reference internal rulepack ids instead of only generic finance rules.

evals.name: finance_rulepack_extraction_and_gap_report
evals.prompt: 从 PRD、SQL DDL、CSV/Excel 等材料抽取财务 rulepack 草稿，并对已有财务用例输出内部规则缺口报告，指出哪些规则是占位、哪些 P0 用例缺内部规则 ID。
evals.expected_output: Creates a draft rulepack from source materials, validates it, and generates a Markdown gap report for case/rulepack alignment.
